Vendored from `@specy/mips` version `1.2.7`.

- Source package: `https://registry.npmjs.org/@specy/mips/-/mips-1.2.7.tgz`
- Upstream description: MARS-derived JavaScript MIPS simulator
- Included file: `index.mjs`

This bundle is checked in so the Electron app can run a MARS-derived MIPS engine without requiring Java or a package-install step at runtime.
